knowledges.label: worth
knowledges.content: The controlled trial idea merits sustained verification because it can distinguish two recorded explanations.

knowledges.label: tension_resolution
knowledges.content: The controlled trial rules out one of two recorded explanations within a stated operating range.

knowledges.label: ev_tension
knowledges.content: An executed discriminating check rules out one competing explanation within an explicitly stated scope.

supported_by.rationale: evidence_family: executed-check; correlation_model: single; anchor: executed discriminating-check artifact (trial fixture)

knowledges.label: verification_cost
knowledges.content: One bounded trial at a specified operating point can decide whether the predicted separation is present.

knowledges.label: ev_cost
knowledges.content: The available trial covers one operating condition and cannot distinguish the broader hypothesis.

supported_by.rationale: evidence_family: scope-limitation; correlation_model: single; anchor: idea_card minimal_compute_plan (trial fixture)

knowledges.label: downstream_reach
knowledges.content: The trial discriminator can be reused in two subsequent comparisons of the same measured response.

knowledges.label: mechanism_insight
knowledges.content: The proposed mechanism predicts a response distinct from the recorded alternative under the trial condition.

knowledges.label: testability_timing
knowledges.content: The required response and comparison data are available for an immediate discriminating trial.

steps.reasoning: reader_reasoning: The executed check demonstrates a scoped partial resolution rather than merely documenting the tension. resolution_evidence: demonstrated_partial_resolution. anchor: executed discriminating-check artifact (trial fixture)
reader_reasoning: Demonstrating a scoped resolution weakly increases the case for sustained verification. anchor: gate_result_v1 generic fixture
reader_reasoning: Limited discriminatory coverage weakly lowers the case for sustained verification. anchor: trial_report_v1 generic fixture
